CancelRestrictions.DescText: After booking policy: Cancellation is allowed with a 100% refund at no fee. Valid after booking until 24 hours after booking.
Cancellation is allowed with a 100% refund at a fee of 265 SAR. Valid 24 hours after booking until 6 hours before departure.
No show policy: Cancellation is allowed with a 0% refund at no fee. Valid 6 hours before departure .
After departure policy: Cancellation is allowed with a 0% refund at no fee.

ChangeRestrictions.DescText: Rebooking allowed with a 0% refund at a fee of 150 SAR allowing for date, flight number, origin, destination, cabin and fare family changes. Valid after booking until 3 hours before departure.
Rebooking is not allowed. Valid 3 hours before departure until moment of departure.
After departure policy: Rebooking is not allowed.
Rebooking allowed with a 0% refund at a fee of 150 SAR allowing for date, flight number, origin, destination, cabin and fare family changes. Valid after booking until 3 hours before departure.
Rebooking is not allowed. Valid 3 hours before departure until moment of departure.
After departure policy: Rebooking is not allowed.
Name change is allowed 1 time(s) with in total max 20 characters at a fee of 100 SAR. Valid after booking until 1 hour before departure.
Name change is not allowed. Valid 1 hour before departure until moment of departure.
Name change is allowed 1 time(s) with in total max 20 characters at a fee of 100 SAR. Valid after booking until 1 hour before departure.
Name change is not allowed. Valid 1 hour before departure until moment of departure.
